heading: Implementation of coordinated disclosure of security vulnerabilities relating to agency information systems, including Internet of Things devices
label: 278g–3d Implementation of coordinated disclosure of security vulnerabilities relating to agency information systems, including Internet of Things devices
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Internet of Things Cybersecurity Improvement Act of 2020, also known as the IoT Cybersecurity Improvement Act of 2020, and not as part of the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definitions of terms used in this section, see .section 278g–3a of this title

children.heading: Agency guidelines required
children.label: a Agency guidelines required
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the Director of OMB, in consultation with the Secretary, shall develop and oversee the implementation of policies, principles, standards, or guidelines as may be necessary to address security vulnerabilities of information systems (including Internet of Things devices).December 4, 2020

children.heading: Operational and technical assistance
children.label: b Operational and technical assistance
children.text: Consistent with , the Secretary, in consultation with the Director of OMB, shall provide operational and technical assistance to agencies on reporting, coordinating, publishing, and receiving information about security vulnerabilities of information systems (including Internet of Things devices).section 3553(b) of title 44

children.heading: Consistency with guidelines from National Institute of Standards and Technology
children.label: c Consistency with guidelines from National Institute of Standards and Technology
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that the assistance provided under subsection (b) is consistent with applicable standards and publications developed by the Director of the Institute.

children.heading: Revision of Federal Acquisition Regulation
children.label: d Revision of Federal Acquisition Regulation
children.text: The Federal Acquisition Regulation shall be revised as necessary to implement the provisions under this section.
